source: Bai tap danh cho hoc sinh lop 6 tu hoc.doc
prompt: Bài tập 6: Tìm n sao cho a) n + 4 {{formula:/assets/math6/formulas/bai-tap-danh-cho-hoc-sinh-lop-6-tu-hoc-doc-e9b56c24/formula0193.png|w=7|h=21}} n + 1 b) n2 + 4 {{formula:/assets/math6/formulas/bai-tap-danh-cho-hoc-sinh-lop-6-tu-hoc-doc-e9b56c24/formula0194.png|w=7|h=21}} n + 2 Giải: a) n + 4 {{formula:/assets/math6/formulas/bai-tap-danh-cho-hoc-sinh-lop-6-tu-hoc-doc-e9b56c24/formula0195.png|w=7|h=21}} n + 1 => (n + 1) + 3 {{formula:/assets/math6/formulas/bai-tap-danh-cho-hoc-sinh-lop-6-tu-hoc-doc-e9b56c24/formula0196.png|w=7|h=21}} n + 1 => 3 {{formula:/assets/math6/formulas/bai-tap-danh-cho-hoc-sinh-lop-6-tu-hoc-doc-e9b56c24/formula0197.png|w=7|h=21}} n + 1 b- n2 + 4 {{formula:/assets/math6/formulas/bai-tap-danh-cho-hoc-sinh-lop-6-tu-hoc-doc-e9b56c24/formula0198.png|w=7|h=21}} n + 2 => n2 + 2n – 2n – 2 + 6 {{formula:/assets/math6/formulas/bai-tap-danh-cho-hoc-sinh-lop-6-tu-hoc-doc-e9b56c24/formula0199.png|w=7|h=21}} n + 1 => n(n + 2) – 2 (n + 2) + 6 {{formula:/assets/math6/formulas/bai-tap-danh-cho-hoc-sinh-lop-6-tu-hoc-doc-e9b56c24/formula0200.png|w=7|h=21}} n + 1
